intro: Built the developer experience for Senza, Synamedia’s cloud-based streaming TV platform, from the ground up. The documentation, sample apps, video tutorials, and tooling I created gave developers everything they needed to evaluate the platform, integrate their apps, and ship to production.
bullets: Conceived and drove two major SDK features (Senza Shaka Player and Auto Background) from problem identification through implementation, dramatically reducing the time customers needed to integrate their apps.
Rebuilt the developer console and device simulator, transforming them from internal tools into a polished customer-facing experience.
Produced 40+ sample apps and 20+ video tutorials covering every major integration scenario, giving developers a working reference for each step of the journey.
Shipped Senza Direct, a self-service onboarding flow that lets new customers get started without waiting for a sales engagement.
Ran an external hackathon to pressure-test the developer experience with real users.
Built AI tools on top of Claude and the MCP protocol that let developers ask questions about the development process and manage their device fleet conversationally.
Designed an automated analytics pipeline that turned raw engagement data into weekly customer behavioral reports, giving the sales team suggested steps for actionable leads.
Helped close enterprise deals by demonstrating AI-assisted development workflows live with potential customers.

intro: Managed a team of 14 engineers responsible for Gopuff’s “Fam” loyalty program. Worked with product partners and stakeholders to promote the program as a key business driver.
bullets: Grew the subscriber base by 237% in one year, and increased the number of orders placed by members of the loyalty program from 15% to 40%.
Relaunched the program with new branding, an annual plan, and member-exclusive prices.
Launched app features to highlight membership benefits and discounted products.
Organized a hackathon, started a mentorship program, and presented at all-hands meets.

intro: Managed 10 engineers across two teams building marketing and agent support tools for Compass real estate agents. Collaborated closely with product, design and marketing teams.
bullets: Designed a system for automating the planning and execution of marketing campaigns.
Built a unified customer support portal aggregating information from a dozen systems.
Created a media management platform for agents to organize their photos and videos.
Developed an application for agents to schedule tours and communicate with clients.
outro: As a Senior Software Engineer, built a web application for creating marketing campaigns. Engineered backend services to connect to print vendors, social networks, email providers and advertising platforms. Integrated functionality into frontend web and mobile clients.

intro: Member of Cisco’s advanced technology team focused on future directions for connected TV, multi-device experiences, and the Internet of Things. Worked closely with marketing to develop proof-of-concept platforms for potential customers.
bullets: Led development of a cross-platform TV developer ecosystem, enabling developers to build apps across cable and satellite platforms from a single API.
Conceived and built Flare, an indoor location platform for wearables. Created SDKs for six platforms, developer docs on Cisco DevNet, external hackathons, and a live demo at NRF.
Built second-screen companion apps for social TV experiences, including a Facebook-powered TV guide and synchronized race-track companion for Top Gear.
Presented platforms at trade shows, developer conferences, and hackathons.

intro: Managed all aspects of running a commercially successful online software business before there was an App Store, including product planning, graphic design, engineering, marketing, distribution, payments, localization, PR and customer support. Developed seven Mac apps:
bullets: iConquer, one of the first games designed with native macOS user interface technologies
Shoebox, an app for organizing photos using a knowledge base of hierarchical categories
HyperImage, an app for downloading entire websites’ worth of images using a web spider
KavaMovies, a personal database to help users manage the movies they want to see

intro: Developed Apple Sales Web, a suite of enterprise applications connecting the company with resellers worldwide. Built Apple Retail Web to support the launch of Apple’s first retail stores, enabling communication between store employees and corporate systems.
Designed and programmed a WebObjects application to archive scientific publications of the Computer Science Laboratory.

Interdisciplinary program in Computer Science, Philosophy, Linguistics & Psychology
Specialization in Human-Computer Interaction
Minor in Russian Language, Literature and Culture
